task: Scaffold task and lock scope to enterprise-safe non-misleading confidence UX
acceptance_criteria: SPEC.md, TODO.csv, and PROGRESS.md exist and scope is limited to projection/UI semantics without runtime math changes
notes: Using taskmaster first so additional confidence/UI questions can be appended later without losing a single truth file

task: Add additive backend report summaries for signal strength and setup reliability
acceptance_criteria: Technical full report exposes deterministic signal_strength_summary and setup_reliability_summary built from existing confidence/quality/observability/conflict data
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_application_use_cases.py finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_interface_serializers.py -q && uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m ruff check finance-agent-core/src/agents/technical/application/technical_report_projection_service.py finance-agent-core/src/agents/technical/interface/contracts.py finance-agent-core/src/agents/technical/interface/serializers.py finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_application_use_cases.py finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_interface_serializers.py
notes: Do not change fusion scoring or calibration runtime in this task

task: Align frontend parser/types and generated contract to new report semantics
acceptance_criteria: Frontend custom types/parsers and generated API contract accept the new summary fields without breaking existing report consumption
validation_command: npm --prefix frontend run test -- src/types/agents/artifact-parsers.test.ts && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run sync:api-contract
notes: Keep legacy raw confidence fields available for advanced/detail rendering

task: Refactor overview UI wording and layout to Direction + Risk Level + Setup Reliability + Signal Strength
acceptance_criteria: Overview no longer shows the current raw value as primary Confidence and clearly distinguishes signal magnitude from setup reliance
validation_command: npm --prefix frontend run test -- src/components/agent-outputs/TechnicalAnalysisOutput.test.tsx src/types/agents/artifact-parsers.test.ts && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
notes: Frontend wording rules should stay centralized in technical-wording.ts

task: Add advanced disclosure and close-out regression coverage
acceptance_criteria: Raw confidence/calibration details remain visible in deeper inspection surfaces and regression tests cover uncalibrated+degraded+high-raw-strength cases
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_application_use_cases.py finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_interface_serializers.py -q && npm --prefix frontend run test -- src/components/agent-outputs/TechnicalAnalysisOutput.test.tsx src/types/agents/artifact-parsers.test.ts && npm --prefix frontend run typecheck
notes: Close out only after backend/frontend semantics, tests, and API contract sync are all green
